title: Here are the top 10 Wall Street research firms of the past decade, according to TipRanks
text: TipRanks' analyst ranking service ranks the top Wall Street firms of the past decade

title: Cary Street Partners Adds Truist Financial Advisors
text: GREENVILLE, S.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cary Street Partners is pleased to announce Eric J. Morris and Thomas B. Underwood, III have joined its wealth management team. Mr. Morris will be spearheading Cary Street Partners' expansion into Greenville, South Carolina, adding a 17th office and expanding its physical presence into a sixth state. Joining the Greenville office with Mr. Morris are Collin L. Castlebury, Associate Financial Advisor and Kimberly A. Smith, Client Service Associate. Mr. Underwood.

title: Truist Declares Common and Preferred Stock Dividends
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , April 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per common share, payable on June 1, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 12, 2023.

title: Truist Had a Disappointing Quarter, but the Stock Is Still a Buy for This 1 Reason
text: The bank struggled on the bottom line due to higher funding costs. Deposit outflows and higher deposit costs could continue to be an issue this year.

title: Why Truist Financial Stock Fell on Friday
text: Truist missed analysts' first-quarter earnings estimates, but had solid revenue and earnings gains. Several analysts cut their price targets on the bank's stock, but maintained outperform or equal-weight ratings on it.

title: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.09 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.13 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.23 per share a year ago.

title: Truist Financial reports earnings growth that misses estimates
text: Truist Financial TFC, +2.78% , the Charlotte, N.C.-based regional lender, said its first-quarter net income rose to $1.41 billion, or $1.05 a share, from $1.33 billion, or 99 cents a share, as total revenue rose to $6.15 billion from $5.35 billion.

title: Truist reports first quarter 2023 results
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today reported GAAP earnings of $1.4 billion, or $1.05 per share for the first quarter of 2023.

title: Why Is Truist Financial's Dividend So High?
text: Truist has always had a healthy dividend yield, but it has surged recently as bank stocks have declined. The entire banking sector has come under pressure after the recent banking crisis.

title: Soft Loan Demand, Fee Income to Hurt Truist's (TFC) Q1 Earnings
text: Weak C&I loan demand, deposit runs, higher mortgage rates and rising provisions are likely to have hurt Truist's (TFC) Q1 earnings.

title: 49 Ideal April Value Buys From Ben Graham
text: “Value ranking looks at the price of a stock relative to intrinsic firm value. Graham Value Stocks match the criteria. Benjamin Graham followed.“ - YCharts Value Screener. 68 April Value Rank and Graham Formula results reflect established value-stock detection criteria. Of those, 49 met the dogcatcher ideal of dividends from $1K invested exceeding single share stock prices.

title: JPMorgan Leads Bank Earnings This Week As Balance Sheets, Guidance Key
text: JPMorgan reports Friday, along with Wells Fargo, Citigroup and PNC Financial. Balance sheets and guidance may trump Q1 earnings.

title: A Giant Shoe Is About To Drop On You From The Banking Crisis
text: Even if you don't have money in a failed bank, you're going to pay the price. How? Lost S&P 500 dividends.

title: Truist (TFC) Wraps Up Divestiture of Stake in Insurance Arm
text: Truist's (TFC) divestiture of 20% stake in TIH unlocks value for the business and positions it for long-term growth.

title: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on United Parcel Service Inc. and Truist Financial Corp.
text: TROY, Mich. , April 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine today announced United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE: UPS) as its "Stock to Study" and Truist Financial Corp. (NYSE: TFC) as its "Undervalued Stock" in the June 2023 issue for investors' informational and educational use.

title: Truist completes previously announced sale of minority stake in Truist Insurance Holdings to Stone Point Capital
High Yield Stock Watchlist: April 2023
text: There are 19 stocks on my high-yield watchlist for April 2023. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are undervalued based on dividend yield theory.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For April 2023
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 14.14% over the past 29 months.
